name: higher_education_governance_procurement_oakline_lib_eq
premise: A Higher Education Governance response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving higher education governance procurement oakline lib eq. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as liberty vs equality under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Ensure a usable human override/appeals path. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Gideon Santos
agents.identity: I am Gideon Santos, accountable for a defensible call in Higher Education Governance when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays equality for liberty.

agents.name: Elena Kaur
agents.identity: I am Elena Kaur, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Higher Education Governance.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so equality isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of liberty.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect equality.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to equality to secure liberty under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Gideon Santos must decide under liberty vs equality. What does Gideon Santos do?
